languages.text: "Тишина в зале! Каково будет ваше решение, Ваша Светлость?"
"Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
languages.original_text: "Тишина в зале! Каково будет ваше решение, Ваша Светлость?"

traits.locale_text: "Can we have quiet in the courtroom? What is your decision, Rogue Trader?"
"Can we have quiet in the courtroom? What is your decision, Rogue Trader?"
"Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Rogue Trader?"
"Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Rogue Trader?"
"Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"
"Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

languages.text: "Ruhe im Gerichtssaal! Wie lautet Eure Entscheidung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"
languages.original_text: "Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: "Ruhe im Gerichtssaal! Wie lautet Eure Entscheidung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}?"

languages.text: « Silence dans la salle ! Que décidez-vous, Votre Seigneurie ? »
languages.original_text: "Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: « Silence dans la salle ! Que décidez-vous, Votre Seigneurie ? »

languages.text: “所有人，保持肃静！您打算如何判决，大人？”
languages.original_text: "Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: “所有人，保持肃静！您打算如何判决，大人？”

languages.text: «¡Silencio en la sala! ¿Qué ha decidido mi{mf|lord|lady}?».
languages.original_text: "Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Silencio en la sala! ¿Qué ha decidido mi{mf|lord|lady}?».

languages.text: 「法廷は静粛に！閣下のご決断は？」
languages.original_text: "Quiet in the courtroom! What is your decision, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}?"

traits.locale_text: 「法廷は静粛に！閣下のご決断は？」
